entity.summary: Liechtenstein-based digital-asset exchange and tokenization platform incorporated in April 2018 and registered with the Financial Market Authority under the country's trusted-technology service-provider framework.
entity.notes: Regulatory and issuer documents identify April 24, 2018 as LCX AG's incorporation date. LCX has been registered with the Liechtenstein FMA under number 288159 since December 30, 2020 for exchange, custody, token issuance, identity, pricing, and related trusted-technology services.

expected.summary: Liechtenstein-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the LCX brand.

changes.summary: Liechtenstein-based digital-asset exchange and tokenization platform incorporated in April 2018 and registered with the Financial Market Authority under the country's trusted-technology service-provider framework.
changes.notes: Regulatory and issuer documents identify April 24, 2018 as LCX AG's incorporation date. LCX has been registered with the Liechtenstein FMA under number 288159 since December 30, 2020 for exchange, custody, token issuance, identity, pricing, and related trusted-technology services.

events.title: LCX AG was incorporated in Liechtenstein
events.description: LCX AG was incorporated in Vaduz, Liechtenstein on April 24, 2018, establishing the corporate lineage of the LCX platform.
events.notes: This is the earliest exact corporate-lineage date verified in reviewed regulatory and issuer documents.

events.title: LCX obtained eight Liechtenstein FMA registrations
events.description: LCX AG became registered with the Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority under number 288159 for eight trusted-technology service-provider activities, including exchange and custody services.
events.notes: The registrations establish a supervised operating framework but do not guarantee assets, returns, or platform performance.

evidence.title: LCX AG registration document
evidence.notes: Passporting document approved by the Liechtenstein FMA records LCX AG's incorporation on April 24, 2018.

evidence.title: LCX imprint
evidence.notes: Official imprint identifies LCX AG, its Liechtenstein commercial-register number, and its 2018 establishment.

evidence.title: LCX receives eight blockchain registrations from the FMA
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the December 30, 2020 registrations and their service categories.

evidence.title: LCX regulatory registration details
evidence.notes: Regulatory document confirms registration with the Liechtenstein FMA since December 30, 2020 under number 288159.

evidence.title: LCX official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current LCX identity and active digital-asset platform.
